checkpoints.title: Which pattern best describes how you currently teach data science or statistical computing?
checkpoints.why: What does that look like in your course? (optional)

checkpoints.title: In the two demos you just saw — what was the unit of instruction in the ETV demo?
Which LFM limitation do you see most in your own students?
choices: Difficulty connecting steps into a full analysis
checkpoints.why: A concrete example, if one comes to mind (optional)

checkpoints.title: You just watched two cycles. Where would you insert your own course's first ETV cycle — and which LFM block feeds it?
choices: Early in the course — fed by data import and wrangling
Early in the course — fed by visualization
Mid-course — fed by data wrangling and visualization
Late in the course — fed by several integrated LFM blocks
checkpoints.why: Why? (this one I really want to read)

checkpoints.title: Which next step would you be most interested in: testing the methods, developing assessments, or collaborating on the research?
choices: Adapting materials for my own course
